title: AwsSolutions-S10
description:
The S3 Bucket or bucket policy does not require requests to use SSL.

Exception Reason: N/A
code_snippet:
Resources:
  BadBucketPolicy:
    Properties:
      Bucket:
        Ref: BadBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Action: s3:*
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Resource:
              - Fn::GetAtt:
                  - BadBucket
                  - Arn
              - Fn::Sub: ${BadBucket.Arn}/*
        Version: '2012-10-17'
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
